mapper.insert: insert into lego_memory_items (id, owner_scope, content, metadata, embedding) values (#{id}, #{ownerScope}, #{content}, cast(#{metadataJson} as jsonb), #{embeddingJson}::jsonb)
mapper.select: select id, owner_scope, content, cast(metadata as text) as metadata_json, cast(embedding as text) as embedding_json, created_at from lego_memory_items where owner_scope = #{ownerScope} and content ilike '%' || #{queryText} || '%' order by created_at desc limit #{topK}
